“We shall see through the night and see what happens with Mira.” She said and then paused before asking, “I understand you spend the nights usually with my daughter.”

So she was keeping an eye on me.

“Yes, my lady. I have been ordered by Lord Carlson to accompany Lady Zara in the evening.” I replied.

“You say her name. Did she permit you to do that?” Elara asked when I took Zara’s name instead of just calling her my lady.

“Please forgive me, my lady. And yes, she permitted me to do so.” I replied, but not before I apologized.

“If so, then there is no need for you to apologize. My daughter has always been this way. She never cared about status since she wanted to prove to her father that she was better than anyone. Alas, in the end, she was sold off for my husband’s ambitions anyway.”

It might sound like she was confiding in me by letting me know Zara’s backstory, but what she was doing really was to ascertain how much I knew.

“I was not aware of that, my lady,” I replied, affirming her suspicions.

She looked at me silently for a while before she breathed in and said, “Since you spend the nights with my daughter, your mornings would be assigned here.”

She spoke fast, as if she knew she wasn’t getting anything out of me today, “We will see Mira's progress, and we’ll continue this conversation tomorrow. If your ability is genuine, and not some coincidence, then we shall carry out some more experiments tomorrow.”

“Unfortunately, I don’t have any more servants I trust in this castle with such important information. Not the female ones, at least.” Elara was quick to throw cold water on that possibility by quickly adding.

“We will continue with Mira and Valeria for now, and once I am sure of your ability, maybe I too will join.” She added.

My disappointment didn’t last for long as soon as Valeria was mentioned, and I nodded quickly, as if afraid she would change her mind, “As you order, my lady.”

With that, I was dismissed and left the room.

“Haa…” I sighed deeply and made my way back to my room while checking the system notifications.

I pressed no for pregnancy, but I didn’t see any other notification aside from that. Not any for Valeria either, aside from the usual ones.

Nothing about awakening their mana or awakening. Not even about the blessings.

I was at a loss as to what was happening. I was pretty sure it wasn’t just the system now. It was also Jack’s bloodline at play.

But with the information I had so far, the moment was too low for me to do anything. I didn’t even know what the next requirements were for the next ability.

I could only leave my fate to the flow of things and focus on the tasks at hand. Aside from Zara and Elara, I also needed to make Carlson’s daughter-in-law play with me, but I decided to push that task back for a while and focused on Zara’s inability to take my mana properly, and whether or not others had the same problem.

One of them was around as tall as me, and one of them was shorter than me by about a foot.

One had breasts full and heavy, taking from her mother, but not as big as hers, and the other was quite flat-chested, but that only enhanced her charm all the more.

“Jack.” The shorter one was first to spot me and beamed, while the other also turned to me and smiled while saying my name.

I also smiled in return while licking my lips hungrily, “Sisters.”
